findings.message: Loom skin.css not found at PlausiDen-Loom/loom-tokens/src/skin.css. Set LOOM_PATH or check out PlausiDen-Loom as a sibling of PlausiDen-Forge.
Loom.Primitive.Paragraph declares trait `no-site-specific` but is missing implied trait `substrate-native`

advocacy.why: per TRAIT_DAG.md implication rules, declaring `no-site-specific` requires also declaring `substrate-native` â€” the substrate refuses to expand implications automatically (declaration is positive per [[deterministic-first-lfi-optional]])
advocacy.substrate_fix: add `substrate-native` to the entity's traits list in trait-manifest.{toml,json}

findings.message: skin.css not present â€” nothing to self-check
no loom.css or loom-skin.css found â€” theme drift not verified

advocacy.why: without the loom-emitted skin.css, the theme-consistency gate can't verify cascade integrity; the build is shipping unchecked theme behavior
advocacy.substrate_fix: ensure `forge build` runs the render phase first (it emits skin.css to static/); if `loom sync --regenerate` was skipped, run it before the next forge build

findings.message: no skin css at any known path (./static/loom.css, ./static/loom-skin.css) â€” contrast not verified
missing sitemap.xml â€” search-engine crawl coverage suffers
missing robots.txt â€” crawler hint missing
no backends.toml â€” UI â†” backend mapping unverified

advocacy.why: without backends.toml the phantom_button + backend_coverage gates can't enforce capability declarations; UI buttons without backing data-backend slugs ship silently broken
advocacy.substrate_fix: create `backends.toml` at the project root with one `[[backend]] id = "..." kind = "..." endpoint = "..."` entry per UI affordance that needs server wiring

findings.message: tokens.css missing â€” skipping contrast phase
dev server not responding â€” start it (e.g. `python3 -m http.server 8123 --directory static`) and re-run; runtime audit skipped
